EmailTemplate.name: AES - Induction invite reminder
EmailTemplate.subject: Time to book your Alliance Extra Staff Induction Session
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
REMINDER: BOOK YOUR INDUCTION SESSION.
Hi {!Candidate.FirstName},
Your first shift is just around the corner! This is a gentle reminder to book your Alliance Extra Staff Induction. Start by selecting a day and time that suits you:
BOOK MY INDUCTION
If you come to one of our offices, you will leave with your new Alliance Extra Staff uniform, ID badge and your first shift!
We are looking forward to working with you!
Kind regards, Your team at Alliance Extra Staff
